title: ToolTreaux Complete Gold Silver Platinum Jewelry Testing Kit with Stone 7pc
description:
Easily test the karat content of gold, as well as the purity of silver and platinum, with ToolTreaux’s Complete Gold Testing Kit. The kit includes six, 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles (10k, 14k, 18k, 22k, silver and platinum) and one testing stone; the testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin and jewelry appraisal or other professions that work with gold and precious metals. And, housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the testing solution bottles are comfortable to maneuver, while also easily maintaining control over the amount of solution escaping the bottle

ToolTreaux Complete Gold Silver Platinum Jewelry Testing Kit with Stone 7pc

Easily test the karat content of gold, as well as the purity of silver and platinum, with ToolTreaux’s Complete Gold Testing Kit. The kit includes six, 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles (10k, 14k, 18k, 22k, silver and platinum) and one testing stone; the testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for gold panning, coin and jewelry appraisal or other professions that work with gold and precious metals. And, housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the testing solution bottles are comfortable to maneuver, while also easily maintaining control over the amount of solution escaping the bottle.

TESTING SOLUTION METHOD: This testing method is ideally used on unfinished gold, silver and platinum pieces, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; however, if testing fine jewelry or other finished items, choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise finishing

Key Features

  • COMPLETE TESTING KIT: Easily test the karat content of gold, as well as the purity of silver and platinum; The kit includes six, 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles and one testing stone; the testing solutions will see you through hundreds of tests
  • TESTING SOLUTION METHOD: This testing method is ideally used on unfinished gold, silver and platinum pieces, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; however, if testing fine jewelry or other finished items, choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise finishing
  • HOW TO USE THE TESTING KIT: To test for karat content or purity, scratch the item on to the test stone leaving a visible deposit and place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if gold is the same karat or higher the deposit will not be affected; if the deposit is of lower karat, the deposit will dissolve; for platinum and silver repeat the same process; if the material is platinum, the deposit will not be affected; if silver material is of high quality, the solution will turn red
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Testing Stone Dimensions: 2 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Stone Weight: 0.01lbs; Bottle Dimensions: 3 x 1 x 1 inches; Bottle Weight: 0.04lbs; Bottle Material: Plastic; Solution Capacity: 0.5 ounces; Solution made in USA

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 9374HFKDH3
  • UPC: 810058483065
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: Small

TESTING FOR GOLD: To test for karat content or purity, scratch the item on to the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if gold is the same karat or higher the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve

TESTING FOR PLATINUM: For platinum repeat the same process as above; if the material is pure platinum, the deposit will not be affected and the solution will not change

TESTING FOR SILVER: For silver, repeat the same process as above; if the material is of high quality silver, the solution will turn bright red; if the solution turns blue or green the sample may contain brass or copper; if the sample deposit dissolves quickly, or the solution turns a dark brown or yellow, it is likely a base metal

PLEASE NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions.
